segments: مَنْ أَرَادَ أَكْلَ الْمَاسْتِ وَ لَا يَضُرُّهُ فَلْيَصُبَّ عَلَيْهِ الْهَاضُومَ قُلْتُ لَهُ وَ مَا الْهَاضُومُ قَالَ النَّانْخَواهُ .
arabic.text: مَنْ أَرَادَ أَكْلَ الْمَاسْتِ وَ لَا يَضُرُّهُ فَلْيَصُبَّ عَلَيْهِ الْهَاضُومَ قُلْتُ لَهُ وَ مَا الْهَاضُومُ قَالَ النَّانْخَواهُ .

segments: (It has been narrated) raising it to Abu Al-Hassanasws having said: ‘The one who intends to eat the yoghurt and for it not to harm him, so let him pour the digestive (الْهَاضُومَ) over it’. I said to himasws, ‘And what is the digestive?’ Heasws said: ‘Al-Nankhwah (A herb)’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, (It has been narrated) raising it to Abu Al-Hassanasws having said: ‘The one who intends to eat the yoghurt and for it not to harm him, so let him pour the digestive (الْهَاضُومَ) over it’. I said to himasws, ‘And what is the digestive?’ Heasws said: ‘Al-Nankhwah (A herb)’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya in a marfu‘ manner has narrated the following: “Once abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, said, ‘If one wants to eat yogurt without harming him, he should pour al-Hadum on it.’ I then asked, ‘What is al-Hadum ?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is al- Nankhoxvah.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya in a marfu‘ manner has narrated the following: “Once abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, said, ‘If one wants to eat yogurt without harming him, he should pour al-Hadum on it.’ I then asked, ‘What is al-Hadum ?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is al- Nankhoxvah.’”

gradings.label: مرفوع
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/170)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى رَفَعَهُ إِلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
